mod.name: Exp Potion
mod.author: Weslley
mod.event:
domodlib('exppotion') function onLogin(cid) if ((getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[3]) > 0) and (getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[1]) - os.time() > 0)) then registerCreatureEvent(cid, "ExpPotionThink") local rates = getPlayerRates(cid) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE, "Você ainda tem "..convertTimeString(getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[1]) - os.time()).." de conhecimento.") doPlayerSetExperienceRate(cid, rates[SKILL__LEVEL]+exp_info.rate) setPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[3], 1) -- registro
elseif ((getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[3]) > 0) and (getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[1]) - os.time() <= 0)) then doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE, "Seu conhecimento diminuiu em 20%. Procure por mais pergaminhos.") setPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[3], 0) -- registro end
if ((getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[4]) > 0) and (getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[2]) - os.time() > 0)) then registerCreatureEvent(cid, "ExpPotionThink") local rates = getPlayerRates(cid) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE, "Você ainda tem "..convertTimeString(getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[2]) - os.time()).." de conhecimento absoluto.") doPlayerSetExperienceRate(cid, rates[SKILL__LEVEL]+exp_info.doubleRate) setPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[4], 1) -- registro
elseif ((getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[4]) > 0) and (getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[2]) - os.time() <= 0)) then doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE, "Seu Pergaminho do EXP acabou.") setPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[4], 0) -- registro end return true end

domodlib('exppotion') function onThink(cid, interval) if(not isPlayer(cid)) then return true end
if ((getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[3]) > 0) and (getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[1]) - os.time() <= 0)) then doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE, "Sua Exp Potion acabou!") local rates = getPlayerRates(cid) doPlayerSetExperienceRate(cid, rates[SKILL__LEVEL]-exp_info.rate) setPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[3], 0) -- registro
elseif ((getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[4]) > 0) and (getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[2]) - os.time() <= 0)) then doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE, "Sua Pergaminho do EXP acabou!") local rates = getPlayerRates(cid) doPlayerSetExperienceRate(cid, rates[SKILL__LEVEL]-exp_info.doubleRate) setPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[4], 0) -- registro end return true end
mod.action:
domodlib('exppotion') function onUse(cid, item, fromPosition, itemEx, toPosition) if (getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[1]) - os.time() > 0) then doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE, "Você não pode usar outra Exp Potion ou Pergaminho do EXP pois ainda possui uma ativa. Você ainda tem "..convertTimeString(getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[1]) - os.time()).." de Exp Potion.") return true elseif (getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[2]) - os.time() > 0) then doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE, "Você não pode usar outra Exp Potion ou Pergaminho do EXP pois ainda possui uma ativa. Você ainda tem "..convertTimeString(getPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[2]) - os.time()).." de Exp Potion.") return true end
if (item.itemid == 21328) then local rates = getPlayerRates(cid) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE, "Você ativou o Pergaminho por "..exp_info.minutes.." minutos! Durante este tempo, você receberá 20% a mais de experiência ao derrotar monstros. Para saber o tempo, digite: !exppotion") setPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[2], os.time()+exp_info.minutes*60) setPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[4], 1) -- registro doPlayerSetExperienceRate(cid, rates[SKILL__LEVEL] * 1.5) registerCreatureEvent(cid, "ExpPotionThink") doRemoveItem(item.uid, 1)
elseif (item.itemid == 21327) then local rates = getPlayerRates(cid) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_STATUS_CONSOLE_ORANGE, "Você ativou Exp potion por "..exp_info.minutes.." minutos! Durante este tempo, você receberá +10% de experiência ao derrotar monstros. Para saber o tempo, digite: !exppotion") setPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[1], os.time()+exp_info.minutes*60) setPlayerStorageValue(cid, exp_info.storage[3], 1) -- registro doPlayerSetExperienceRate(cid, rates[SKILL__LEVEL]+exp_info.rate) registerCreatureEvent(cid, "ExpPotionThink") doRemoveItem(item.uid, 1) end return true end
